title: Chewy Japanese Tofu Skewers
description: Savory, chewy tofu on a sweet‑savory glaze with Chinese five‑spice, perfect for a comforting Jain‑friendly lunch.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: cut into 1.5 cm cubes and pressed for 30 min

instructions: Press the tofu for 30 minutes, then cut into 1.5 cm cubes.
Whisk tamari, sesame oil, maple syrup, Chinese five‑spice, grated ginger, and lime juice to make the glaze.
Gently toss tofu cubes in the glaze and let marinate for 10 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium‑high heat and lightly oil the grates.
Thread marinated tofu cubes onto skewers, leaving a small gap between each.
Grill the skewers, turning every 2 minutes, until edges caramelized and browned, about 10–12 minutes total.
Remove from heat, sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds and cilantro.
Serve immediately hot with an extra drizzle of glaze or a side of tamari dipping sauce.
